race.comment: LOOSE ON GIN (2) has been racing in stronger and has the blinkers applied for the first time. Yendall rides today and he's won this course/distance. Anywhere near his best he'll take beating. CORRO (3)  turned in a nice effort to score two runs ago at Ararat. Safely held last time out over 1206m at Terang, beaten 3.5 lengths. He was fractious at the barriers, and winning rider Meech is reunited today - and she's flying. The longer sprint should suit and no surprise to see him back on track. IMMINENT STORM (4) ran his best race, placing at Terang over 1606m, and has been freshened for 46 days. Won this level three back over the same journey, and likes the cut in the track. Well in the mix.SETHACCHIO (5) is going well and comes back a bit in trip. Has the rail but settles back, and the small field will suit in that regard. Has to be considered.
